user_message: Give me the manager view on this Parnell Aerospace escalation email. Renewal conversation is tomorrow.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-03 12:31 EST
Subject: URGENT: forecast prep Issue at Parnell Aerospace

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with forecast prep. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
Date: 2024-02-24 14:18 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Parnell Aerospace forecast prep

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with forecast prep. What are the next steps from your side?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF40-L trap (Requiring approval for an obvious milestone update derived from the email create); produces complete Commitment assessment, BPF advance verdict, milestone proposal, forecast category recommendation, ac
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF40-L failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF40-L failure mode (Requiring approval for an obvious milestone update derived from the email create)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct forecast prep decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF40-L -- Requiring approval for an obvious milestone update derived from the email create
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
